coverage_note: The bundled MSH2 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from MSH2 DNA mismatch recognition, microsatellite stability, replication-error repair, and Lynch syndrome biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000095002: MSH2 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: MSH2 findings should be read against DNA mismatch recognition, microsatellite stability, replication-error repair, and Lynch syndrome biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

MSH2 loss-of-function model is curated as a MSH2 marker for Lynch syndrome review context, Microsatellite instability biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

EPCAM-MSH2 silencing model is curated as a MSH2 marker for Lynch syndrome review context, Microsatellite instability biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
